race.description: Sun Trade Windows Final Pride Handicap Chase (GBB Race)
race.comment: BROOMFIELDS CAVE (2) has been inconsistent this campaign. Bounced back to form with a solid 2.75L triumph at Wincanton. Goes well fresh. Should still be respected following that success. LOUP DE MAULDE (4) returned to form when only 4.75L behind the main selection last time out. Might prefer this track and likely to go very well. INFLEXIBLE (5) notched up the second win of his chasing career at Uttoxeter last month and hasn't been harshly treated. Not without a chance of going back to back. CHARLES RITZ (3) ran well to be third at Kempton Park last month and could easily take a big step forward in this contest.
